title: Musket Fire
description: When muskets fire, they actually fire.
body: # Musket Fire This is a _really_ simple addon for [ewewukek's musket mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/musket-mod), that makes so that when you fire from musket and such, well... there is a blast of fire (purely visual). Compatible with [Galosphere Muskets](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere-muskets). Check out gallery to see the mod in action. ## Contributing You can contact me on discord. ![kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be71a956eb99b7cf5ca41da1cc0df26e5f71e7e_0.webp)
